name: @ai4x/cap
description: Cognitive capability portfolio and quality gates

scripts.check: npm run check:meta && npm run check:shape && npm run check:indexes && npm run check:agent-neutral && npm run check:layout-neutral
scripts.test: bash checks/tst/capability-meta.sh && bash checks/tst/capability-shape.sh && bash checks/tst/agent-neutral.sh && node --test checks/tst/capability-meta-schema.test.mjs
